add.des: 插入目录组与目录关系

insert.add: INSERT INTO dir_group_dir (group_id, dir_path, sort, name, description) VALUES (:group_id, :dir_path, :sort, :name, :description)

query.des: 查询目录组与目录关系

modify.des: 更新目录组与目录关系

update.modify: UPDATE dir_group_dir SET group_id = :group_id, dir_path = :dir_path, sort = :sort, name = :name, description = :description WHERE id = :id

removeById.des: 删除目录组与目录关系

removeByGroupId.des: 根据目录组ID删除与目录关系
